claims.summary: Addressed, pending, receipt-complete, and unknown delivery are materially different states.
claims.disposition: Verify the existing delivery ledger and no-automatic-resend state machine preserve those distinctions.

claims.summary: Technical delivery neither confirms nor disproves Astrid’s felt effect.
claims.disposition: Verify the felt-effect boundary records unresolved-not-absent interpretation with explicit Astrid ownership.

claims.summary: Receipt latency is transport evidence and cannot stand in for receptive or felt latency.
claims.disposition: Verify receipt timing remains labeled as a transport handshake measurement only.

claims.summary: Perceived weight or density gradient cannot safely become a pressure input or causal assertion.
claims.disposition: Hold any live pressure coupling or spectral-causation claim behind exact Mike/operator approval.
